# All Seasons Screens & Blinds
> Brisbane's trusted security screen and blinds specialist — over 25 years protecting homes in Redlands and Brisbane and surrounding suburbs.

## About
All Seasons Screens & Blinds is a locally owned business based in Capalaba, QLD 4157, founded by Mark Flynn. We have been supplying and installing security screens, fly screens, Crimsafe products, and custom blinds for over 25 years. ABN 28 929 253 611.

## Services
- Security Doors: Heavy-duty hinged and sliding security screen doors with stainless steel and aluminium mesh options, triple lock systems.
- Fly Screens: Custom-fitted fly screen doors and windows, including retractable and pet-resistant mesh options.
- Crimsafe: Australia's strongest security screen brand. Crimsafe Regular, Ultimate, and Safe-S-Cape with patented Screw-Clamp technology and 10-year warranty.
- Screen Mesh: Aluminium and stainless steel security mesh. Re-screening and mesh replacement for existing frames.
- Blinds: Roller blinds, venetian blinds (timber and aluminium), vertical blinds, panel glides, and Roman blinds.
- Repairs & Rescreening: Fly screen mesh replacement, security screen repairs, door roller and track repairs, lock replacements.

## Brands We Supply
Crimsafe, Amplimesh, Prowler Proof, Invisi-Gard, Secureview

## Contact
- Phone: 0409 051 727
- Email: allseasonsscreens@bigpond.com
- Location: Capalaba, QLD 4157, Australia
- Hours: Monday-Saturday 8am-5pm, Sunday closed
- Free measure and quote on all products

## Service Areas
Capalaba, Cleveland, Wynnum, Manly, Redland Bay, Victoria Point, Thornlands, Alexandra Hills, Birkdale, Ormiston, Wellington Point, Mount Cotton, Sheldon, Chandler, and all of Brisbane and surrounding suburbs.

## Key Facts
- 25+ years in the security screen industry
- Locally owned and operated — no subcontractors
- Crimsafe authorised supplier and installer
- GST registered since July 2016
- Free measure and quote on all jobs
